title: sort_by_key re-parses timestamp O(N log N) times
description: load_messages_for_chat (client_task.rs:526) calls messages.sort_by_key(|m| m.sent_at.parse().ok()), which invokes the RFC 3339 parser O(N log N) times during the sort instead of O(N). With limit=100 this is 700 chrono parse calls per chat open. Fix: use sort_by_cached_key to memoize the parse result per element.
